title: More Minecarts
description: A mod that adds new and exciting minecarts to Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds new and exciting minecarts to Minecraft!

These minecarts include
- Emerald Minecart
- Diamond Minecart
- Copper Minecart
- Gold Minecart
- & more!
Some minecarts, like the Redstone Minecart has a special ability that allows it to power any rail underneath it!
